artifacts.title: Ant Gait artifact gap
artifacts.current_replay: examples/ant-gait-replay isolates yaw_drift with CPG cadence, stance duty and yaw feedback in pure Python.
artifacts.next_experiment: Add an optional high-fidelity Ant runner that reuses the same yaw_drift probe and reports whether the lightweight invariants survive contact dynamics.
artifacts.boundary: The current replay teaches the controller idea; it is not a MuJoCo reproduction.

artifacts.title: Breakout artifact gap
artifacts.current_replay: examples/breakout-replay isolates missed_after_wall_reflection with a deterministic side-wall intercept model.
artifacts.next_experiment: Add a RAM/vision field mapping table and keep missed_after_wall_reflection as the invariant probe before any emulator run.
artifacts.boundary: The current replay validates the reflection heuristic only, not full Atari Breakout performance.

artifacts.title: VizDoom artifact gap
artifacts.current_replay: examples/vizdoom-replay isolates wasted_pickup and valued_pickup with health, area and offset fields.
artifacts.next_experiment: Map replay fields to real detector outputs, then run the same pickup threshold ablation on fixed recorded frames.
artifacts.boundary: The current replay is a detector-output abstraction, not an OpenCV or VizDoom reproduction.

artifacts.title: Robot Soccer internal gap
artifacts.source_reference: 脱敏应用方向：机器人足球策略学习
artifacts.current_replay: examples/robot-soccer isolates blocked_shot with a minimal grid, ball ownership and opponent lane check.
artifacts.next_experiment: Create a sanitized fixed replay with perception noise and preserve blocked_shot as the regression probe.
artifacts.boundary: The public course keeps only the sanitized failure pattern; it must not expose Feishu raw content.

artifacts.title: Traffic Grid internal gap
artifacts.source_reference: 脱敏应用方向：交通控制
artifacts.current_replay: examples/traffic-grid isolates spillback with downstream capacity and queue release decisions.
artifacts.next_experiment: Define a sanitized fixed traffic scenario and test whether downstream capacity remains the hard safety invariant.
artifacts.boundary: The public course captures the control invariant, not the internal simulator or private task record.

artifacts.title: GridWorld teaching gap
artifacts.current_replay: examples/heuristic-gridworld isolates local_greedy_trap with a pure Python grid and trap-aware action selection.
artifacts.next_experiment: Use generated maps to test whether trap avoidance remains readable without becoming a hidden planner.
artifacts.boundary: GridWorld is a pedagogical anchor; it should not be cited as evidence for real-world HL performance.

artifacts.title: Constraint Audit research gap
artifacts.current_replay: examples/constraint-audit isolates supplied-catalog contradictions and evidence escalation for unknown claims.
artifacts.next_experiment: Evaluate atomic claims with timestamped evidence and separate generation from verification before studying any game-theoretic objective.
artifacts.boundary: The fixture does not measure general hallucination detection, answer quality, or Nash-equilibrium convergence.
